hooks.command:
input=$(cat); ts=$(date "+%H:%M:%S"); LOG=$HOME/.claude/projects/-Users-joy-Developer-Auto/file_ops.log; printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r --arg ts "$ts" 'def indent($p): split("
") | map($p + .) | join("
"); if .tool_name == "Write" then "
▸ \($ts)  Write   \(.tool_input.file_path)
  ┌─ preview (head 15 lines) ─
" + ((.tool_input.content // "") | split("
")[:15] | join("
") | indent("  │ ")) + "
  └─" elif .tool_name == "Edit" then "
▸ \($ts)  Edit    \(.tool_input.file_path)
  ┌─ before ─
" + ((.tool_input.old_string // "") | indent("  │ ")) + "
  ├─ after ─
" + ((.tool_input.new_string // "") | indent("  │ ")) + "
  └─" else "
▸ \($ts)  \(.tool_name) \(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // "")" end' >> "$LOG"
